chapter_title.ar: باب تَقْدِيمِ النَّوَافِلِ وَ تَأْخِيرِهَا وَ قَضَائِهَا وَ صَلَاةِ الضُّحَى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – Preceding the optional (Salāt) and delaying it, and its payback, and the Salāt at forenoon

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/419)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/419)
text: كَانَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقْضِي عِشْرِينَ وَتْراً فِي لَيْلَةٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Al-Mugheira, from Abu Jareer Al-Qummy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It was so that Abu Ja’farasws had fulfilled twenty Witr (Salāts) in one night’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn al-Mughirah from abu Jarir al-Qummiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Abu Ja‘far would perform the Qada’ (compensatory prayer) twenty al-Witr in one night.’”
